description.en: Adjusts the clock for this SVG document fragment, establishing a new current time. IfsetCurrentTime()is called before the document timeline has begun (for example, by script running in a<script>element before the document'sSVGLoadevent is dispatched), then the value of seconds in the last invocation of the method gives the time that the document will seek to once the document timeline has begun.
